_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'HelloBetter Chronische Schmerzen', as evidenced by the title 'HelloBetter Chronic Pain Study' and the detailed description of the intervention as 'HelloBetter ratiopharm chronic pain', which is a web-based therapy program based on Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT).

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled trial (RCT) with a parallel design, testing the HelloBetter ratiopharm chronic pain digital therapy program against a care-as-usual control group. Randomization and control are key features of an RCT.
